overall.description: Static panoramic view of a futuristic cyberpunk cityscape at dusk, featuring neon-lit skyscrapers across a harbor with industrial boats and drifting smoke plumes. Game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the Night City waterfront with atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk waterfront harbor with neon city skyline

agents.ego_description: standing still at the waterfront, observing the cyberpunk cityscape across the harbor

entered.detail: dense cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings illuminated with neon lights and holographic advertisements
tall industrial chimney emitting white smoke plumes into the evening sky
dark reflective water surface of the harbor with subtle ripples
rusted industrial boats and barges docked along the right waterfront
distinctive building with prominent red-orange neon lighting on its facade
floating holographic advertisements and signage between buildings

segments.scene_description: A static view of a cyberpunk city waterfront at dusk, showcasing a dense skyline of neon-lit skyscrapers across the harbor. Industrial smoke drifts from a distant stack on the left while moored vessels sit in the dark water. The scene features mixed natural twilight and vibrant artificial neon illumination with no visible pedestrian or vehicle activity.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, atmospheric vista of a futuristic waterfront that captures the transition between natural twilight and artificial neon brilliance. It begins with a wide view of a dense cyberpunk skyline, where towering skyscrapers cast vibrant glows across the harbor. As the eye wanders across the dark water, moored industrial vessels sit in stillness beneath the looming architecture. The scene then settles on the distant horizon, where plumes of industrial smoke drift slowly from a stack on the left into the deepening dusk.
